actions.title: Apply a repair plan
actions.description: Apply a repair plan's auto-safe config fixes after an explicit, plan-hash-bound approval, then verify.
actions.authoritySummary: Applies ONLY auto-safe, config-only fixes the policy allows (no demotion, no gate weakening, no mainnet, no secrets). The approval is bound to the plan hash.
actions.rollbackOrCleanup: the previous config is saved to <config>.bak; the receipt records the before/after state hashes

actions.title: Diagnose a config
actions.description: Diagnose a node config against a deployment profile and propose typed fixes (read-only).

config.description: Path to the node config to diagnose.

actions.title: Produce a repair plan
actions.description: Produce a sealed, plan-hash-bound repair plan for a config + profile (read-only).

actions.title: Explain a remediation receipt
actions.description: Summarize a remediation receipt (what changed, before/after, manual actions remaining).

actions.title: Verify a config
actions.description: Re-validate a plan's config against its profile (read-only).

actions.title: Open a Cinema replay
actions.description: Build a Cinema replay URL for a workflow so a human can watch what executed.

actions.title: Start the one-command demo
actions.description: Run the golden governed escrow demo flow, export a portable proof, and verify it.

endpoint.description: Kermit-mode L0 endpoint (network name or URL).

outDir.description: Where to write demo artifacts. Defaults to an agent scratch dir.

actions.authoritySummary: Runs locally with no keys (local mode) or bootstraps a funded Kermit identity (kermit mode). Never touches mainnet.
actions.expectedProofLevel: L3 offline (local mode); L4/G2 live (kermit mode)
actions.rollbackOrCleanup: infrix demo stop (or agent action demo.stop) clears local demo state

actions.title: Stop the demo
actions.description: Stop a running local demo and clear its state.

outDir.description: The demo out dir to stop. Defaults to the standard demo dir.

actions.authoritySummary: Stops a local process and removes local demo state files. No network, no keys.
actions.rollbackOrCleanup: none needed; stopping is itself the cleanup

actions.title: Run environment diagnostics
actions.description: Run infrix doctor checks (toolchain, build, services, L0, profiles) for a persona.

actions.title: Run a curated example
actions.description: Run a supported curated example in-process and verify its proof.
actions.authoritySummary: Runs the example's governed flow locally (no keys) or live on Kermit. Never mainnet.
actions.rollbackOrCleanup: produced artifacts live in an agent scratch dir; nothing on-chain in local mode

actions.title: Search the curated example gallery
actions.description: Find curated examples by text, tier, or persona, with their prerequisites.

actions.title: Explain a signature
actions.description: Explain, in plain language, exactly what a signature request will do (action, network, authority, funds, disclosure, agent-initiated, proof, irreversible effects).

actions.title: List permissions
actions.description: List the capabilities currently granted (session scopes + grants), in one plain shape.

actions.title: Request a scoped agent session
actions.description: Request a capability-scoped agent session. A scope is mandatory and the human must approve; a mainnet session must be explicitly authorized.

capabilities.description: the allowed action ids (at least one)

actions.authoritySummary: Creates a capability-scoped agent session the agent can act within. A scope is mandatory; the human approves; mainnet is never the default.
actions.expectedProofLevel: n/a (a scoped capability grant, not a proof)

actions.title: Revoke an agent session
actions.description: Revoke a previously-granted agent session by id.
actions.authoritySummary: Revokes an agent session so it can no longer act.
actions.rollbackOrCleanup: request a fresh scoped session with identity.requestSession

actions.title: Show identity status
actions.description: Return the aggregated identity control-center view (wallet, sessions, permissions, warnings). Never includes a private key.

actions.title: Comment on a proof inbox item
actions.description: Add a review comment to an item. A comment never alters the underlying proof.
actions.authoritySummary: Appends a review comment to a local inbox item; never touches the artifact bytes or the artifact hash.
actions.rollbackOrCleanup: comments are append-only; archive the item to retire it

actions.title: Import a proof artifact into the inbox
actions.description: Import an artifact (proof story, receipt, release evidence, remediation receipt, task run, or scenario draft), independently verify it, and create an inbox item.

artifact.description: An inline self-contained artifact (e.g. a proof-story share bundle).

artifactPath.description: Alternatively, a filesystem path to the artifact.

ask.description: What the recipient is asked to approve.

l0Endpoint.description: L0 endpoint to confirm an L4 claim.

actions.authoritySummary: Writes a local inbox item + an immutable copy of the artifact bytes; verifies independently (trusts no node). Never writes the network.
actions.expectedProofLevel: the artifact's own verified level (never raised by import)
actions.rollbackOrCleanup: the item + artifact copy live under the agent inbox store; archive it to retire it

actions.title: List proof inbox items
actions.description: List the redaction-safe summaries of items in the proof inbox.

archived.description: List the archived (audit) lane instead of the active one.

actions.title: Prepare a decision for signing
actions.description: Build the canonical, UNSIGNED decision body + hash an authorized signer must sign. An agent prepares; it cannot sign unless its session was granted signing authority.

delegateTo.description: For delegate: who to delegate to.

actions.title: Sign a decision on a proof inbox item
actions.description: Sign and record a decision (approve/reject/etc.) bound to the item's exact artifact hash. Requires a session explicitly granted signing authority.

delegateTo.description: For delegate: who to delegate to.

signer.description: Signer identity label (a dev key is derived from it).

actions.authoritySummary: Mints an Ed25519 decision bound to the exact verified artifact hash. The agent may sign ONLY when its session was granted signing authority; an approve is refused unless the verifier passed.
actions.expectedProofLevel: n/a (a signed review decision, bound to the artifact's verified level)
actions.rollbackOrCleanup: decisions are append-only; archive the item to retire it

actions.title: Summarize a proof inbox item
actions.description: Return the redaction-safe shared summary of an item (no private payload).

actions.title: Verify a proof inbox item
actions.description: Independently re-verify an item's artifact and update its honest verification verdict.

l0Endpoint.description: L0 endpoint to confirm an L4 claim.

actions.title: Package MetaMask acceptance receipt
actions.description: Turn a captured MetaMask acceptance run's metadata into a fail-closed proof receipt.

assuranceLevel.description: Achieved level, e.g. L4/G2 (live) or offline.

infrixCommit.description: The Infrix commit the run was captured against.

typedDataSigned.description: Whether a real EIP-712 typed-data signature was produced.

actions.authoritySummary: Produces a local receipt artifact from an operator's already-captured run. No keys, no network, no on-chain effect.
actions.expectedProofLevel: L4/G2 for a live PASS with verified proof; PARTIAL (offline EIP-712) otherwise — never overclaims
failureModes: metadata overclaims its level (rejected by the fail-closed validator)
actions.rollbackOrCleanup: the receipt is a local file; delete it to discard

actions.title: Verify MetaMask acceptance receipt
actions.description: Verify a MetaMask acceptance receipt and confirm it does not overclaim.

actions.title: Open a Nexus view
actions.description: Build a Nexus URL for a governance view so a human can inspect it.

view.description: Route name (e.g. spine, prove, govern, agent).

actions.title: Create proof receipt
actions.description: Verify a bundle and emit the canonical, fail-closed proof receipt artifact.

inputSchema.description: A portable evidence package to turn into a receipt.

bundlePath.description: Alternative: a path to the bundle JSON on disk.

l0Endpoint.description: Optional L0 endpoint for live confirmation.

actions.title: Explain proof receipt
actions.description: Explain a proof receipt in user language and confirm it does not overclaim.

actions.title: Verify proof bundle
actions.description: Verify a portable Infrix proof without trusting the producing node.

inputSchema.description: A portable evidence package and optional L0/level constraints.

bundle.description: The portable evidence package to verify.

bundlePath.description: Alternative: a path to the bundle JSON on disk.

l0Endpoint.description: Optional Accumulate L0 endpoint (network name or URL) for live L4 confirmation.

requiredLevel.description: Optional required assurance level, e.g. L4/G2.

actions.title: Check node substrate readiness
actions.description: Query a node's substrate readiness dashboard and optionally evaluate a deployment profile.

endpoint.description: Node v4 API base URL (default http://localhost:8080).

profile.description: Optional deployment profile to evaluate against.

actions.title: Make release evidence
actions.description: Generate a signed, L0-anchored release evidence package for the current commit.

l0Endpoint.description: L0 endpoint to anchor the evidence root on.

network.description: Network to anchor on (testnet only pre-launch).

signerKey.description: Signer key (seed file for local-dev, base64 pubkey for managed).

witnesses.description: Number of independent witnesses to gather.

actions.authoritySummary: Signs the evidence root with the operator-custody signer and anchors it on the named testnet L0. Never mainnet.
actions.rollbackOrCleanup: the package lives in outRoot; an unpublished package can be deleted; the L0 anchor is immutable

actions.title: Publish release evidence
actions.description: Publish a verified, signed release evidence tarball to a write-once destination.

l0Endpoint.description: L0 endpoint to re-confirm the anchor.

tarball.description: The verified evidence tarball to publish.

actions.authoritySummary: Publishes only AFTER re-verifying the evidence; signs the publication receipt with the operator-custody signer.
actions.rollbackOrCleanup: write-once destinations cannot be rolled back; that is the point — verify first

actions.title: Verify release evidence
actions.description: Verify a signed, L0-anchored release evidence package without trusting the publisher.

claimNetwork.description: The network the evidence may claim.

expectedCommit.description: The exact git commit the evidence must prove.

l0Endpoint.description: L0 endpoint for live anchor confirmation.

path.description: Path to the evidence dir or tarball.

actions.title: Draft a scenario from a template
actions.description: Return a customizable scenario draft from a template id.

actions.title: Export a scenario proof story
actions.description: Pack a completed run's proof story into a single self-contained, shareable bundle.

inputSchema.description: The run output directory to pack.

actions.title: List scenario templates
actions.description: List the built-in scenario templates an agent can build from.

actions.title: Run a scenario
actions.description: Run a scenario through the canonical governed flow and emit a verifiable proof story.

inputSchema.description: Scenario to run (either an inline scenario or a template id).

template.description: Alternatively, a template id to run.

actions.authoritySummary: Runs the canonical governed flow with no keys (local) or a bootstrapped Kermit identity. Never mainnet.
actions.rollbackOrCleanup: artifacts live in an agent scratch dir; nothing on-chain in local mode

actions.title: Validate a scenario
actions.description: Validate a scenario draft (actors, policy, steps, proof, no mainnet).

actions.title: Verify a scenario proof story
actions.description: Independently verify a proof story (checksums, proof, replay, Cinema binding, honesty).

inputSchema.description: The story to verify (a run dir or a story path).

l0Endpoint.description: L0 endpoint to confirm an L4 claim.

outDir.description: A run output directory (verifies its story).

actions.title: Describe MetaMask connection
actions.description: Return how a human connects MetaMask and signs — the agent never receives keys.

keyPageUrl.description: Optional Accumulate key-page URL to bind the wallet key to.

actions.title: Ask the workbench (intent → plan)
actions.description: Describe an outcome in plain language; get a grounded, typed plan (candidates, missing inputs, required authority, expected proof level, safety). Read-only.

inputSchema.description: What you want to prove or do.

network.description: Target network (local|kermit). Never mainnet by default.

actions.title: Dry-run a planned request
actions.description: Plan a request and preview exactly what running it would do, by delegating to the selected surface's real dry-run. Never mutates.

actions.title: Explain a planned request
actions.description: Explain in plain language what Infrix would do for a request: the chosen capability, why, the network, required inputs, authority, safety, and expected proof. Read-only.

actions.title: Plan a request
actions.description: Produce the typed, hash-bound plan for a request (candidates, selection, inputs, network, safety). Read-only.

actions.title: Run a planned request
actions.description: Plan a request, dry-run it, and (after an input-bound approval) execute it through the existing gated surface, returning the verifier's proof receipt.
actions.authoritySummary: Plans only from grounded registry capabilities; runs the selected one through its existing safety gate after a plan-hash-bound approval. Never executes model output directly, never writes mainnet, never skips verification.
actions.expectedProofLevel: comes from the verifier (L3 offline / L4 live), never asserted by the workbench
failureModes: approval missing or not bound to the plan
actions.rollbackOrCleanup: local runs touch only an agent scratch dir; nothing on-chain in local mode. The run is recorded in a sealed, redacted transcript.

actions.title: Execute a governed workflow
actions.description: Run the golden governed escrow workflow end-to-end and export a verifiable proof.
actions.authoritySummary: Runs the governed flow with no keys (local) or a bootstrapped Kermit identity (kermit). Never mainnet.
actions.rollbackOrCleanup: local runs touch nothing on-chain; the proof bundle lives in an agent scratch dir

actions.title: Export a workflow proof
actions.description: Export a portable proof bundle to a file and confirm it verifies offline.

bundlePath.description: Alternative: a path to the bundle JSON on disk.

outPath.description: Where to write the exported bundle. Defaults to an agent scratch dir.

actions.title: Plan a governed workflow
actions.description: Return the plain-English plan for a governed Infrix workflow (the canonical spine).

goal.description: A plain-English goal (e.g. 'run a governed escrow and prove it').
